description: User invokes /start-review-team with name 'review-pool' which already exists.
Pre-flight check detects existing pool directory at ~/.claude/teams/standing/review-pool/. Conflict reported.
assertion: conflict_detected is true; existing_pool_path ends with 'review-pool'

description: Command aborted. Error message names the conflict and suggests /list-teams or /stop-review-team for remediation.

state.error_message: A standing pool named 'review-pool' already exists at ~/.claude/teams/standing/review-pool. Use /list-teams to see active pools or /stop-review-team --name review-pool to stop it first.

assertion: error_message references '/list-teams' or '/stop-review-team' as remediation hint
